data: {"type":"response.in_progress","response":{"id":"resp_01","object":"response","created_at":1700000000,"status":"in_progress","output":[]},"sequence_number":1}

data: {"type":"response.content_part.added","item_id":"msg_01","output_index":0,"content_index":0,"part":{"type":"output_text","text":"","annotations":[]},"sequence_number":3}

data: {"type":"response.output_text.delta","item_id":"msg_01","output_index":0,"content_index":0,"delta":"Hello","sequence_number":4}

event: response.output_text.delta
